11. Inquest Report/ U.D. Case
12. Contents of the complaint / statement of the complainant or informant:
IN THE COURT OF JUDICIAL FIRST CLASS MAGISTRATE AT MAKTHAL. Honoured Sir, The brief facts
of the case are that on 19.04.2026 at 12:00 hours, the complainant Smt. Jaya Sree W/o Rajesh Gouli, Age: 52 years,
Caste: Kshathriya, Occ: Senior Public Prosecutor R/o Ranaprathap Singh Colony, Raichur Town, Karnataka state,
Ph.9880343208 came to Makthal PS and lodged a Telugu written petition in which she stated that on 18.04.2026
around 06:00 hours, she and her husband Rajesh Gouli S/o G.R.Babu Rao, Age: 57 years and her husband's elder
sister Rajeshwari Hemanth Navigere W/o Hemanth Kamalakar Navigere, Age: 61 years R/o Pune together
proceeded to Hyderabad to her husband's younger sister house on her husband's Car (Ford Company Freestyle Gold
colour) bearing no. KA 32 P 3291 and while the above three returning to Raichur in the same car driven by her
husband on 19.04.2026 around 01:30 hours, near Kachwar Toll gate in Makthal mandal on NH-167, a dog suddenly
came across by which the car overturned and dashed the divider further flipped by which she and her husband
received minor injuries. But her husband's elder sister Rajeshwari received fractures to right leg and left shoulder.
And the total car was damaged. Immediately she and her husband shifted Rajeshwari to Govt. Hospital, Makthal.
Further on the advice of doctors shifted to Suraksha Hospital, Raichur for better treatment. Hence requested to take
necessary legal action as per law. Received on 19.04.2026 at 12:00 hours: As per the contents of the above petition,
I, V.Achary, SIP-II, Makthal PS registered a case in Cr.No. 127/2026 U/s 125(a), 281 BNS and further investigation
entrusted to V. Shankaraiah, ASI. Sd/- V. Achary, Sub Inspector of Police-II, MAKTHAL P.S. Copy submitted
W/Cs to: 1. The Superintendent of Police, Narayanpet forfavour of information. 2. The SDPO Narayanpet through
the C.I.P. Makthal for favour of information.

To,
NOTICE FOR APPEARANCE BY THE POLICE
[As per section 35(3) of B.N.S.S.]
FIR No. 127/2026 U/s 125(a),281 BNS Dated: 19.04.2026
PS: Makthal, Dated: 04.05.2026
Rajesh Gouli @ Rajesh Gowli S/o G.R.Babu Rao, Age: 57 years, Caste:
Kshthriya, Occ: Business R/o H.No.4-7-92, Mathashri Ladies corner and
General Store, Mochiwada Shashimahal Talkies Road, Opp.Dr.Ravi Hospital,
Mangalwarpet, Raichur Town and District. Ph.9880343208.
In pursuance of sub-section (3) of section 35 of the Bharatiya Nagarik
Suraksha Sanhita, 2023, I hereby inform you that during the investigation
of FIR/Case No: 127/2026 U/s 125(a), 281 BNS Dated: 19.04.2026 registered
at Police Station Makthal, Narayanpet it is revealed that there are
reasonable grounds to question you to ascertain facts and circumstances
from you, in relation to the present investigation. Hence you are directed to
appear before me at 11:00AM/PM on 05.05.2026 at Makthal Police Station.
Although you are not being placed under arrest at this stage in respect of
the aforesaid FIR, you are directed to comply with all of the following
conditions/directions:
A. You will not commit any offence in the future;
B. You will not tamper with the evidence(s) in the case in any manner
whatsoever;
C.You will not make any threat, inducement, or promise to any person
acquainted with the facts of the case so as to dissuade him/her from
disclosing, such facts to the Court or to the Police Officer;
D.You will appear before Court as and when required/directed;
E.You will join the investigation of the case as and when required and will
cooperate in the investigation;
F.You will disclose all the facts truthfully without concealing any part
relevant for the purpose of investigation to reach the true and accurate
conclusion of the case;
G.You will produce all relevant documents/material required for the purpose
of investigation;
H.You will render your full cooperation/assistance in apprehension of the
accomplice;
I.You will not allow in any manner destruction of any evidence relevant for
the purpose of investigation/trial of the case;
J.Any other conditions which may be imposed by the investigating
officer/SHO as per the facts of the case.
Failure to attend/comply with the terms of this Notice can render you
liable for arrest under Sec.35(6) of the BharatiyaNagarik Suraksha
Sanhita, 2023.
Name: V.Achary,
Rank: SIP-II, Makthal PS
(Seal)
--- PAGE BREAK ---
No.1/Cr.No.127/2026.

issued under Section 35(3) BNSS, the Notice has appeared on:05.05.2026
at 11:00 hours.
That the Notice's presence has been recorded in the register to be
maintained by the Police Station: MAKTHAL.

35(3) BNSS. The documents produced by the Notice have duly been seized
vide seizure memo/production memo (copy enclosed). The notice undertakes
to continue to comply with any further notice that she / he may receive
during the course of the present investigation.
Vo

Makthal PS.
